mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FOREIGN_CONSIGNMENT_ORDER( IFA_ORDER_NO , IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO , ACCEPT_ORDER_NO , ACCEPT_ORDER_SUB_NO , BUTEN_CODE , ACCOUNT_NUMBER , BRAND_CODE , BRAND_NAME , EXCHANGE_CODE , METHOD_TYPE , TRADE_TYPE , ORDER_QUANTITY , TRADE_METHOD_TYPE , LIMIT_PRICE , STOP_PRICE , CURRENCY_CODE , SETTLEMENT_TYPE , DEPOSIT_TYPE , INVITATION_TYPE , ORDER_METHOD_TYPE , WARNING_APPLY_TYPE , EXPLANATION_INFO_TYPE , TRANSFER_INVITATION_TYPE , ENG_PUB_BRAND_EXP_TYPE , CONFIRMATION_TYPE , ORDER_TYPE , ORDER_DATE , ORDER_TIME , TRADE_DATE , TRADE_LIMIT_DATE , BROKER_CODE , INTERMEDIARY_EMP_CD , API_ERROR_CODE , API_STATUS_CODE , API_MESSAGE , CREATE_TIME , CREATE_USER , UPDATE_TIME , UPDATE_USER) VALUES( TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || LPAD(SEQ_FOREIGN_CONSIGNMENT_ORDER.NEXTVAL, 5, '0') , 1 , #{req.orderNumber} , #{req.orderSubNumber} , #{req.butenCode} , #{req.accountNumber} , #{req.brandCode} , #{req.brandName} , #{req.marketCode} , '10' , #{req.tradeKbn} , #{req.foreignQuantity} , #{req.orderPriceKindList} , TO_NUMBER(#{req.hiddenOrderPrice}) , TO_NUMBER(#{req.stopOrderPrice2}) , #{req.stopOrderPriceText2} , #{req.kessaiHoho} , #{req.depositType} , #{req.kanyuKbn} , #{req.orderClassification} , null , #{req.importantMatterType} , null , #{req.engPubText} , #{req.checkInsider} , '0' , TO_CHAR(#{req.orderDateTime}, 'YYYYMMDD') , #{req.orderDateTime} , #{req.tradeDate} , #{req.period} , #{req.brokerCode} , #{req.brokerChargeCode} , null , null , null , IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE , #{req.userId} , IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE , #{req.userId})
